generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX 2D LiDAR providing real-time point clouds over ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera providing depth point clouds via ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance EgoSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On-board chassis electronics measuring ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoSpeedTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On-board chassis electronics measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (Data Transmitted)
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance EgoSpeedTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Data (raw and processed)
instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data as received from Hokuyo LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance RawDepthCameraPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera point cloud data from Intel D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance RawEgoSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw ego speed measurement in m/s"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoSpeedTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance RawSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw steering angle measurement in degrees"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance ClusteredLiDARPointsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered LiDAR points after DBSCAN clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked objects (position, velocity) generated by Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance DesiredSpeedDecisionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed desired speed from ACC algorithm per ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoSpeedTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RemoteActuationEnabler
]

instance VisualizationFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization payload for UI showing speed, steering, tracks, projected path"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2VisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 Data Translation FE for unit conversion and serialization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware handling messaging between Physical Twin and Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External compute node executing ACCControlModel via ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interface to electronic speed controller and steering servo for actuation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 visualization pipeline delivering UI updates"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// C10: Models
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN point‑cloud clustering module processing raw LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance KalmanObjectTrackerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter based object tracker producing object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model implementing ISO 15622 logic, executed on external compute"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance Visualization3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization model for UI rendering of vehicle state and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2VisualizationEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring – real‑time UI visualization, reporting, and storage of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, PostMissionReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading – execution of ACC algorithm on external compute and returning computed speed"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedDecisionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management – UI controls to enable/disable ACC, adjust set‑point speed, and issue emergency brake"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, AdjustACCSetPointAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operators see real‑time visualizations of speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path"
]

instance PostMissionReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports for post‑mission analysis of vehicle performance"
]

instance DesiredSpeedDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm output – desired speed command sent to vehicle actuation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to enable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to disable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustACCSetPointAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator adjustment of ACC set‑point speed"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency brake command issued by operator or safety system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends desired speed commands, ACC enable/disable signals, modified speed set-points, and emergency braking commands back to the PT through the Actuation FE, which translates them into motor voltage and steering servo signals."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All DT-PT interactions are bounded by a maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms and the distributed components maintain clock synchronization within 100 ms, satisfying real-time requirements for ACC."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation orchestrates the Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators), the Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC, reporting, visualization) and the User Entity (UI panels), communicating intra-entity via ROS 2 and inter-entity over Wi-Fi using the standardized interface defined in requirement R1."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during design (cyber-physical experimentation), testing, deployment, and runtime operation for monitoring, validation and remote control of the ACC function."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High-fidelity interaction is ensured by maintaining ≤100 ms latency, synchronized clocks, real-time sensor sampling, and adherence to ISO 15622 ACC specifications; the DT stores raw and processed data for offline validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication uses ROS 2 topics for intra-entity data exchange and Wi‑Fi (IP-based) for inter-entity links; a standardized communication interface (R1) and the Data Translation FE perform serialization, type alignment and unit conversion."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity and User Entity run on external compute (e.g., a workstation or cloud server) separate from the on-board Jetson devices that host the Physical Twin Entity; each Functional Entity is packaged as an independent ROS 2 node."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system follows ISO 23247 reference architecture, utilizes ISO/IEC 30173 terminology, implements ACC logic per ISO 15622, and aligns latency requirements with 3GPP TS 22.185 (V2V) specifications."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include the 100 ms latency bound, 100 ms clock synchronization, and adherence to ISO 15622 ACC safety class I; remote commands are mediated through the User Interface FE to prevent unsafe actuation, but explicit security mechanisms are not described."
]
